name: Mike Judge Presents: Tales from the Tour Bus
original_name: Mike Judge Presents: Tales from the Tour Bus
overview: The raucous adventures of some of music’s most legendary artists, as told by those who knew them best. Featuring animated interviews with former bandmates, friends and other erstwhile associates, who share uncensored anecdotes about these artists, brought to life with animated reenactments and woven together with live-action archival performance footage and photos.
